title: Lumineon
description: Built a real-time collaborative workspace that enables teams to create and interact on shared boards with seamless live synchronization, role-based permissions, and optimized state persistence for a responsive multi-user experience.

title: Civic Care
description: Built a civic grievance platform that allows citizens to report public issues, connect with relevant authorities, and track complaint resolution through real-time status updates, improving transparency and accountability.

title: Adapt Learn
description: Engineered an AI-powered career intelligence platform that evaluates resume alignment against target roles, delivers actionable competency insights, and generates personalized learning pathways with curated resources to accelerate professional growth and job readiness.
